verses.latin_vulgate: Liber generationis Jesu Christi filii David, filii Abraham.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: βίβλος γενέσεως ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ υἱοῦ δαβὶδ υἱοῦ ἀβραάμ
verses.king_james: The book of the generation of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abraham genuit Isaac. Isaac autem genuit Jacob. Jacob autem genuit Judam, et fratres ejus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀβραὰμ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰσαάκ ἰσαὰκ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰακώβ ἰακὼβ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰούδαν καὶ τοὺς ἀδελφοὺς αὐτοῦ
verses.king_james: Abraham begat Isaac; and Isaac begat Jacob; and Jacob begat Judas and his brethren;

verses.latin_vulgate: Judas autem genuit Phares, et Zaram de Thamar. Phares autem genuit Esron. Esron autem genuit Aram.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἰούδας δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν φαρὲς καὶ τὸν ζαρὰ ἐκ τῆς θάμαρ φαρὲς δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἑσρώμ ἑσρὼμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀράμ
verses.king_james: And Judas begat Phares and Zara of Thamar; and Phares begat Esrom; and Esrom begat Aram;

verses.latin_vulgate: Aram autem genuit Aminadab. Aminadab autem genuit Naasson. Naasson autem genuit Salmon.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀρὰμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀμιναδάβ ἀμιναδὰβ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ναασσών ναασσὼν δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν σαλμών
verses.king_james: And Aram begat Aminadab; and Aminadab begat Naasson; and Naasson begat Salmon;

verses.latin_vulgate: Salmon autem genuit Booz de Rahab. Booz autem genuit Obed ex Ruth. Obed autem genuit Jesse. Jesse autem genuit David regem.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: σαλμὼν δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν βοὸζ ἐκ τῆς ῥαχάβ βοὸζ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ὠβὴδ ἐκ τῆς ῥούθ ὠβὴδ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰεσσαί
verses.king_james: And Salmon begat Booz of Rachab; and Booz begat Obed of Ruth; and Obed begat Jesse;

verses.latin_vulgate: David autem rex genuit Salomonem ex ea quæ fuit Uriæ.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἰεσσαὶ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν δαβὶδ τὸν βασιλέα δαβὶδ δὲ ὁ βασιλεὺς ἐγέννησεν τὸν σολομῶντα ἐκ τῆς τοῦ οὐρίου
verses.king_james: And Jesse begat David the king; and David the king begat Solomon of her that had been the wife of Urias;

verses.latin_vulgate: Salomon autem genuit Roboam. Roboam autem genuit Abiam. Abias autem genuit Asa.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: σολομὼν δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ῥοβοάμ ῥοβοὰμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀβιά ἀβιὰ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀσά
verses.king_james: And Solomon begat Roboam; and Roboam begat Abia; and Abia begat Asa;

verses.latin_vulgate: Asa autem genuit Josophat. Josophat autem genuit Joram. Joram autem genuit Oziam.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀσὰ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰωσαφάτ ἰωσαφὰτ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰωράμ ἰωρὰμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ὀζίαν
verses.king_james: And Asa begat Josaphat; and Josaphat begat Joram; and Joram begat Ozias;

verses.latin_vulgate: Ozias autem genuit Joatham. Joatham autem genuit Achaz. Achaz autem genuit Ezechiam.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὀζίας δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰωάθαμ ἰωάθαμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἄχαζ ἄχαζ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἐζεκίαν
verses.king_james: And Ozias begat Joatham; and Joatham begat Achaz; and Achaz begat Ezekias;

verses.latin_vulgate: Ezechias autem genuit Manassen. Manasses autem genuit Amon. Amon autem genuit Josiam.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐζεκίας δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν μανασσῆ μανασσῆς δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀμών ἀμὼν δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰωσίαν
verses.king_james: And Ezekias begat Manasses; and Manasses begat Amon; and Amon begat Josias;

verses.latin_vulgate: Josias autem genuit Jechoniam, et fratres ejus in transmigratione Babylonis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἰωσίας δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰεχονίαν καὶ τοὺς ἀδελφοὺς αὐτοῦ ἐπὶ τῆς μετοικεσίας βαβυλῶνος
verses.king_james: And Josias begat Jechonias and his brethren, about the time they were carried away to Babylon:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et post transmigrationem Babylonis: Jechonias genuit Salathiel. Salathiel autem genuit Zorobabel.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: μετὰ δὲ τὴν μετοικεσίαν βαβυλῶνος ἰεχονίας ἐγέννησεν τὸν σαλαθιήλ σαλαθιὴλ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ζοροβάβελ
verses.king_james: And after they were brought to Babylon, Jechonias begat Salathiel; and Salathiel begat Zorobabel;

verses.latin_vulgate: Zorobabel autem genuit Abiud. Abiud autem genuit Eliacim. Eliacim autem genuit Azor.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ζοροβάβελ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀβιούδ ἀβιοὺδ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἐλιακείμ ἐλιακεὶμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀζώρ
verses.king_james: And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor;

verses.latin_vulgate: Azor autem genuit Sadoc. Sadoc autem genuit Achim. Achim autem genuit Eliud.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἀζὼρ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν σαδώκ σαδὼκ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἀχείμ ἀχεὶμ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἐλιούδ
verses.king_james: And Azor begat Sadoc; and Sadoc begat Achim; and Achim begat Eliud;

verses.latin_vulgate: Eliud autem genuit Eleazar. Eleazar autem genuit Mathan. Mathan autem genuit Jacob.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐλιοὺδ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἐλεάζαρ ἐλεάζαρ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ματθάν ματθὰν δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰακώβ
verses.king_james: And Eliud begat Eleazar; and Eleazar begat Matthan; and Matthan begat Jacob;

verses.latin_vulgate: Jacob autem genuit Joseph virum Mariæ, de qua natus est Jesus, qui vocatur Christus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἰακὼβ δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν ἰωσὴφ τὸν ἄνδρα μαρίας ἐξ ἧς ἐγεννήθη ἰησοῦς ὁ λεγόμενος χριστός
verses.king_james: And Jacob begat Joseph the husband of Mary, of whom was born Jesus, who is called Christ.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes itaque generationes ab Abraham usque ad David, generationes quatuordecim: et a David usque ad transmigrationem Babylonis, generationes quatuordecim: et a transmigratione Babylonis usque ad Christum, generationes quatuordecim.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πᾶσαι οὖν αἱ γενεαὶ ἀπὸ ἀβραὰμ ἕως δαβὶδ γενεαὶ δεκατέσσαρες καὶ ἀπὸ δαβὶδ ἕως τῆς μετοικεσίας βαβυλῶνος γενεαὶ δεκατέσσαρες καὶ ἀπὸ τῆς μετοικεσίας βαβυλῶνος ἕως τοῦ χριστοῦ γενεαὶ δεκατέσσαρες
verses.king_james: So all the generations from Abraham to David *are* fourteen generations; and from David until the carrying away into Babylon *are* fourteen generations; and from the carrying away into Babylon unto Christ *are* fourteen generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Christi autem generatio sic erat: cum esset desponsata mater ejus Maria Joseph, antequam convenirent inventa est in utero habens de Spiritu Sancto.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦ δὲ ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ ἡ γέννησις οὕτως ἦν μνηστευθείσης γὰρ τῆς μητρὸς αὐτοῦ μαρίας τῷ ἰωσὴφ πρὶν ἢ συνελθεῖν αὐτοὺς εὑρέθη ἐν γαστρὶ ἔχουσα ἐκ πνεύματος ἁγίου
verses.king_james: Now the birth of Jesus Christ was on this wise: When as his mother Mary was espoused to Joseph, before they came together, she was found with child of the Holy Ghost.

verses.latin_vulgate: Joseph autem vir ejus cum esset justus, et nollet eam traducere, voluit occulte dimittere eam.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἰωσὴφ δὲ ὁ ἀνὴρ αὐτῆς δίκαιος ὢν καὶ μὴ θέλων αὐτὴν παραδειγματίσαι ἐβουλήθη λάθρα ἀπολῦσαι αὐτήν
verses.king_james: Then Joseph her husband, being a just *man*, and not willing to make her a publick example, was minded to put her away privily.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc autem eo cogitante, ecce angelus Domini apparuit in somnis ei, dicens: Joseph, fili David, noli timere accipere Mariam conjugem tuam: quod enim in ea natum est, de Spiritu Sancto est.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ταῦτα δὲ αὐτοῦ ἐνθυμηθέντος ἰδοὺ ἄγγελος κυρίου κατ᾽ ὄναρ ἐφάνη αὐτῷ λέγων ἰωσὴφ υἱὸς δαβὶδ μὴ φοβηθῇς παραλαβεῖν μαριὰμ τὴν γυναῖκά σου τὸ γὰρ ἐν αὐτῇ γεννηθὲν ἐκ πνεύματός ἐστιν ἁγίου
verses.king_james: But while he thought on these things, behold, the angel of the Lord appeared unto him in a dream, saying, Joseph, thou son of David, fear not to take unto thee Mary thy wife: for that which is conceived in her is of the Holy Ghost.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pariet autem filium: et vocabis nomen ejus Jesum: ipse enim salvum faciet populum suum a peccatis eorum.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τέξεται δὲ υἱὸν καὶ καλέσεις τὸ ὄνομα αὐτοῦ ἰησοῦν αὐτὸς γὰρ σώσει τὸν λαὸν αὑτοῦ ἀπὸ τῶν ἁμαρτιῶν αὐτῶν
verses.king_james: And she shall bring forth a son, and thou shalt call his name JESUS: for he shall save his people from their sins.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc autem totum factum est, ut adimpleretur quod dictum est a Domino per prophetam dicentem:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦτο δὲ ὅλον γέγονεν ἵνα πληρωθῇ τὸ ῥηθὲν ὑπὸ τοῦ κυρίου διὰ τοῦ προφήτου λέγοντος
verses.king_james: Now all this was done, that it might be fulfilled which was spoken of the Lord by the prophet, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce virgo in utero habebit, et pariet filium: et vocabunt nomen ejus Emmanuel, quod est interpretatum Nobiscum Deus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἰδοὺ ἡ παρθένος ἐν γαστρὶ ἕξει καὶ τέξεται υἱὸν καὶ καλέσουσιν τὸ ὄνομα αὐτοῦ ἐμμανουὴλ ὅ ἐστιν μεθερμηνευόμενον μεθ᾽ ἡμῶν ὁ φεός
verses.king_james: Behold, a virgin shall be with child, and shall bring forth a son, and they shall call his name Emmanuel, which being interpreted is, God with us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exsurgens autem Joseph a somno, fecit sicut præcepit ei angelus Domini, et accepit conjugem suam.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: διεγερθεὶς δὲ ὁ ἰωσὴφ ἀπὸ τοῦ ὕπνου ἐποίησεν ὡς προσέταξεν αὐτῷ ὁ ἄγγελος κυρίου καὶ παρέλαβεν τὴν γυναῖκα αὑτοῦ
verses.king_james: Then Joseph being raised from sleep did as the angel of the Lord had bidden him, and took unto him his wife:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non cognoscebat eam donec peperit filium suum primogenitum: et vocavit nomen ejus Jesum.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καὶ οὐκ ἐγίνωσκεν αὐτὴν ἕως οὗ ἔτεκεν τὸν υἱὸν αὑτῆς τὸν πρωτότοκον καὶ ἐκάλεσεν τὸ ὄνομα αὐτοῦ ἰησοῦν
verses.king_james: And knew her not till she had brought forth her firstborn son: and he called his name JESUS.
